zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Dafydd於大約1400年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Dafydd Ap Gwilym43歲，母親Gwenlian Verch Phillip47歲。她和Sir Dafydd ap Mathew至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1470年在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Dafydd于大约1400年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Dafydd Ap Gwilym43岁，母亲Gwenlian Verch Phillip47岁。她和Sir Dafydd ap Mathew至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1470年在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Dafydd was born about 1400, in Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, was 43 and her mother, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, was 47. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Dafydd ap Mathew. She died about 1470, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 72.

fr.Llandaff, Glamorganshire, Wales: Llandaff, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Dafydd est née environ 1400, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, avait 47 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Dafydd ap Mathew. Elle est décédée environ 1470, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Dafydd um 1400 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dafydd Ap Gwilym 43 und ihre Mutter Gwenlian Verch Phillip 47. Sie hatte mit Sir Dafydd ap Mathew mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1470 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

ht.Llandaff, Glamorganshire, Wales: Llandaff, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Dafydd è nata il circa 1400 nel Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, aveva 47 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Dafydd ap Mathew. Morì circa 1470, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Dafyddが約1400年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Dafydd Ap Gwilymは43歳，母Gwenlian Verch Phillipは47歳であった。彼女はSir Dafydd ap Mathewとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1470年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Dafydd(이)가 대략 1400년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd Ap Gwilym(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenlian Verch Phillip(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 Sir Dafydd ap Mathew(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Dafydd nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Dafydd Ap Gwilym, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gwenlian Verch Phillip, tinha 47 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Dafydd ap Mathew. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1470, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Dafydd родилась около 1400 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Dafydd Ap Gwilym было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenlian Verch Phillip, 47. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Sir Dafydd ap Mathew. Она умерла около 1470 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 72 лет.
